Cache a source file

Source: R/ducksemantics.R
ducksemantics_cache_file.Rd

Cache a source file

Usage

ducksemantics_cache_file(
  url,
  filename = basename(url),
  cache_dir = tools::R_user_dir("ducksemantics", "cache"),
  refresh = FALSE
)

Arguments

url

Source URL.

filename

Cache filename.

cache_dir

Cache directory.

refresh

Download even when the cache file already exists?

Value

Normalized path to the cached file.

On this page
